title: anomos #0459
definition:
1) destitute of (the Mosaic) law
    1a) of the Gentiles
 2) departing from the law, a violator of the law, lawless, wicked
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) destitute of (the Mosaic) law
    1a) of the Gentiles
 2) departing from the law, a violator of the law, lawless, wicked

    NASB:  lawless, without law:
